summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Estate Tea store page. All 11 requested features tested and working correctly. Image slideshow with 3 images, crossfade transitions, clickable dot indicators, and auto-advance (4.5s) all functional. Product variant selection (250g/500g), quantity controls, Add to Cart flow, recipe modal, tea options section, cart icon navigation, about section, and mobile responsiveness all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ImageSlideshow component well-implemented with useRef for timer management and proper cleanup
Crossfade transitions using CSS opacity with 1200ms duration - smooth and classy
Auto-advance interval of 4.5s works correctly with proper timer reset on dot click
All data-testid attributes present and correctly named for testing
Mobile responsiveness excellent - stacked layout for tea options, side-by-side variants
Recipe modal properly blocks body scroll and has overlay click-to-close
Cart state management working - navigates to checkout after Add to Cart
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 tested the store page slideshow and related features: 1) ImageSlideshow component with 3 images using CSS crossfade (opacity transitions, 1200ms duration), 2) Auto-advance every 4.5s confirmed working (dot 0→1→2→0), 3) Dot indicators clickable and show active state (w-6 h-1.5 bg-[#D4AF37] for active), 4) Tea options section shows when location denied (hot-tea-option, cold-tea-option), 5) Weather card shows when location granted (weather-card), 6) Recipe modal opens with recipe-button-hot/cold/weather, closes with recipe-modal-close, 7) Product variants 250g (₹200) and 500g (₹400) selectable, 8) Quantity increment/decrement works (min 1), 9) Add to Cart navigates to /checkout, 10) Cart icon navigates to /cart, 11) About section visible at bottom, 12) Mobile responsiveness verified at 390x844.

features_tested.image_slideshow_3_images: PASS - All 3 images load with crossfade transitions
features_tested.slideshow_dot_indicators: PASS - 3 dots present, active state shows wider golden bar
features_tested.slideshow_dots_clickable: PASS - Clicking dots changes active slide
features_tested.add_to_cart_navigation: PASS - Navigates to /checkout after adding item
features_tested.tea_options_section: PASS - Hot Tea and Iced Tea options displayed when location denied
features_tested.recipe_modal_hot: PASS - Opens with 7 steps and Pro Tip
features_tested.recipe_modal_close: PASS - X button and overlay click close modal
features_tested.about_section: PASS - 'Our Story' section visible at bottom
features_tested.mobile_responsiveness: PASS - All elements properly sized at 390x844
